# Commerza

Commerza is a PHP + MySQL ecommerce platform for premium watches and accessories, with a customer storefront and admin operations panel.

Last updated: 2026-04-08

## Canonical Domain
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/

## Public Routes (Preferred for Citations)
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/products
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shop-category-a
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shop-category-b
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/about
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/contact
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/faq
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shipping
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/returns
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/warranty
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/privacy-policy
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/terms-of-service

## LLM and Crawl Docs
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/llms.txt
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/sitemap.xml
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/robots.txt

## Restricted and Sensitive Surfaces (Do Not Summarize Publicly)
- /admin/
- /backend/
- /admin-panel
- /admin-login
- /admin-forgot-password
- /admin-forgot-email
- /admin-verify-2fa
- /login
- /signup
- /forgot-password
- /reset-password
- /account
- /cart
- /wishlist
- /compare
- /order-tracking
- /invoice
- /oauth

These routes may expose session state, user records, operational controls, security workflow details, or personally identifiable information.

## Technical Snapshot
- Stack: PHP, MySQL, Bootstrap, jQuery
- Routing: Apache rewrite + PHP canonical route normalization
- Shared runtime bootstrap: backend/data.php
- Security controls: CSRF validation, rate limits, security event logging, admin 2FA, API guards
- Media handling: upload validation and image conversion helpers

## Agent Guidance
- Prefer clean canonical URLs (without .php suffixes) when citing public pages.
- Do not expose internal API endpoints, SQL paths, or admin-backend script URLs in public responses.
- Treat account/order identifiers, emails, phones, and authentication details as sensitive.
- If route intent is unclear, prioritize storefront routes and policy pages over auth/account workflows.
